# Phenomenology of Spirit

*[Hegel](../philosophers/hegel.md) · 1807 · *Phänomenologie des Geistes**

[Hegel](../philosophers/hegel.md)'s first great work, finished at Jena in 1807: a "pathway of despair" in which consciousness rises, figure after figure, from sense-certainty to absolute knowing. It contains the master–slave dialectic, the unhappy consciousness and the beautiful soul, a phenomenology of the forms of spirit in its history.
